event.name: IPL 2027 Opening Match — Mumbai Indians vs Chennai Super Kings

context.pre_match_notes: IPL opener. Wankhede, evening, humidity 76% — dew expected MODERATE-HIGH from over 14. Mumbai home. CSK experienced at adapting to dew (MS Dhoni era institutional knowledge). Both teams IPL giants. Toss crucial.

question: Predict match direction if the toss winner elects to bat first despite dew conditions.

verified_outcome.score: CSK won chasing — dew factor materialised from over 14
verified_outcome.key_variable: dew_factor MODERATE-HIGH — chasing team structural advantage outweighed Mumbai home advantage
